positive: A central, stylized illustration of a neon geometric hummingbird in flight, rendered in a pop art vaporwave aesthetic. The hummingbird should be composed of interlocking triangles and abstract shapes glowing with electric teal, vibrant magenta, and neon cyan lines. It is surrounded by an ethereal, symmetrical constellation of glowing abstract flora and crystalline geometric patterns, forming a strong, repeating silhouette against a dark void background. The style should be highly detailed, vector art quality, clean lines, high contrast, perfect symmetry, and flat graphic elements suitable for direct apparel printing. Cinematic volumetric lighting, centered composition, 8K resolution.
